positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial landscape merging with earthly flora. The central element is a grand, bioluminescent crescent moon hanging over rolling, stylized mountains. Below, intricate, flowing vines and abstract glowing leaves cascade across the foreground, forming a clean, interlocking silhouette pattern. The style is modern abstract art mixed with Art Nouveau fluidity, using a deep, midnight blue and teal color palette contrasted sharply with glowing electric lavender and lime green accents. The composition must be perfectly centered and designed with large negative spaces suitable for clothing print placement. High contrast, clean lines, vibrant glow, 8K digital illustration, vector art quality, perfect composition, symmetry.
